item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: Painting my cosplays - The Mask - MCroft07
item.description: I AM IN THE UK AND HAVE BEEN BLOCKED FROM USING IMGUR!!! PLEASE FIND ME ON OTHER SOCIALS I AM TRYINGGGGGGG I managed to get on here with a VPN but Imgur doesn't like Vpns so I might lose access again soon. Basically, every time I post is a day I can get on here. Thank you so much to those people who want to try and help me with private VPNs but I have really bad tech aura and I break a lot of things so this is truly the best way forward, also I'm scared of being told off for spamming on here haha. IF you still want to follow me and see what I am doing please PLEASE find me on https://linktr.ee/mcroft07?utm_source=linktree_profile_share I HATE THE GOVERNMENTS TOO Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror No, it is not AI I just looked at an anatomical drawing of a skeleton and copied it I use professional body paint covers (pasties) this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle “Why don’t you just wear clothes” once again, body painting myself is my hobby/passion. I am painting my skin, I am not wearing a suit - but that does not mean I am naked. I know, even I think this is a ridiculous set of questions I have to constantly answer I did not go to art school, I am self taught. Talent gets you so far, but this is a learned skill. The paint isn’t edible (gross) I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007, UK 7 is my shoe size No, I don't need help painting my back, I don't want to paint my back, I don't need to paint my back. (also gross) No, I don't need help washing it off. (also you are gross) If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I couldn’t care less if you think they’re cringe. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan I do not have an OF but if you want to send me money THAT badly you can just tip my twitch account. Haha. The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. The reason why it can look different at the end is because I am wearing a wig, I promise you it is not a different person because the hair changed. While on this topic, if my eyes change colour it’s because I am wearing contact lenses. (Those with an IQ above 10… I know. Even I’m shocked the wig thing is a frequent comment). I use body paint. It doesn’t tickle, I am very ticklish and this is fine. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am English, not American. I do not go outside like this to scare people. 1, that would be very cold. 2, in this current age, everyone would take photos without me knowing and it would likely dox me :)))))) I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life It would not be quicker to jump into a pool of paint - think of the drying time?! Really proud of myself because I just bought a cheap top from Vinted and it was too small so I changed the back from a zipper to a corset style top to make it bigger to fit me and it worked! My secondary school textiles teacher would be proud of me! I don’t care that I wash it off at the end, I get to reuse this canvas, we love a reduce, reuse, recycle queen. I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself. I know a lot of you don’t like reading this faq because it is horrid to see that I have to answer all of these. Unfortunately I have noticed that when I don’t put in all the icky things then I get more gross comments and I just have to spend more time blocking people so it’s better to call it out. I just copy and paste it each time anyway.
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: Tried on some new cosplay stuff
item.dc:creator: scarlettsirene

item.title: Well fuck... This is the kinda shit I love to see in the world!!! Delighted for this kid and his new family!!!

intergalactic gif by @babyfarkmcgeezax
item.dc:creator: lydecker17

item.title: In 2018, an 8-year-old girl and her mom were driving when they saw bikers crash. The mom, a nurse, rushed to help treat the injured. About a year passed and the girl set up a lemonade stand. This was the bikers’ way of saying, "Thank you."
item.dc:creator: kenistod

item.title: Goodbye Wally, your watch is over and you can rest.
item.dc:creator: Dpatgotbanned

item.title: I TATTOOED MY HAIR!!?? - MCroft07 (not clickbait)
item.description: Trying to figure out the captions, I know how to do it on social media platforms but not here! <3 I AM IN THE UK AND HAVE BEEN BLOCKED FROM USING IMGUR!!! I managed to get on here with a VPN but Imgur doesn't like Vpns so I might lose access again soon. Basically, every time I post is a day I can get on here. Thank you so much to those people who want to try and help me with private VPNs but I have really bad tech aura and I break a lot of things so this is truly the best way forward, also I'm scared of being told off for spamming on here haha. IF you still want to follow me and see what I am doing please PLEASE find me on https://linktr.ee/mcroft07?utm_source=linktree_profile_share I HATE THE GOVERNMENTS TOO Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror No, it is not AI I use professional body paint covers (pasties) this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked when doing torso paints. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle “Why don’t you just wear clothes” once again, body painting myself is my hobby/passion. I am painting my skin, I am not wearing a suit - but that does not mean I am naked. I know, even I think this is a ridiculous set of questions I have to constantly answer I did not go to art school, I am self taught. Talent gets you so far, but this is a learned skill. The paint isn’t edible (gross) I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007, UK 7 is my shoe size No, I don't need help painting my back, I don't want to paint my back, I don't need to paint my back. (also gross) No, I don't need help washing it off. (also you are gross) If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I couldn’t care less if you think they’re cringe. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan I do not have an OF but if you want to send me money THAT badly you can just tip my twitch account. Haha. The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. The reason why it can look different at the end is because I am wearing a wig, I promise you it is not a different person because the hair changed. While on this topic, if my eyes change colour it’s because I am wearing contact lenses. (Those with an IQ above 10… I know. Even I’m shocked the wig thing is a frequent comment). I use body paint. It doesn’t tickle, I am very ticklish and this is fine. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am English, not American. I do not go outside like this to scare people. 1, that would be very cold. 2, in this current age, everyone would take photos without me knowing and it would likely dox me :)))))) I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life It would not be quicker to jump into a pool of paint - think of the drying time?! Really proud of myself because I just bought a cheap top from Vinted and it was too small so I changed the back from a zipper to a corset style top to make it bigger to fit me and it worked! My secondary school textiles teacher would be proud of me! I don’t care that I wash it off at the end, I get to reuse this canvas, we love a reduce, reuse, recycle queen. I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself. I know a lot of you don’t like reading this faq because it is horrid to see that I have to answer all of these. Unfortunately I have noticed that when I don’t put in all the icky things then I get more gross comments and I just have to spend more time blocking people so it’s better to call it out. I just copy and paste it each time anyway.
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: As Coach from Letterkenny would say…FUCKIN EMBARASSING
item.dc:creator: siflandollysiflandollyshowROCK

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1626 (Andes mint duck)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
It's those hydrothermal fluids that can potentially help color a crystal.
"Homer started with the Illiad, but he really started cooking with The Odyssey"-- @racheKatze, probably
Hell yeah they are
LOLOLOL oh buddy
Caudipteryx, Mark Witton
The two genus names are a letter a apart.
A species of Amazonian Flycatcher
I also slow down for birds, alongside geology
Seriously, Ghengis Khan's early life was an absolute disaster.
I'd buy it.
Inshallah.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Hey Pippin!" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Phone-clearing dump 412
item.description:
WTF mate
Actual pic of my husband and I
All hail Anoia! The Goddess of Things That Get Stuck in Drawers. Also, GNU STP
And enfleurage perfumes by pressing flowers in to fat (butter. It was butter and no it did not turn out nice).
Palaeeudyptes klekowskii was taller, but kumimanu fordyce was bigger.
A rise, getting thrown off ättestupan…. One of them.

Figured this was a good one for THT today! Little preview of my upcoming Lady Loki Cosplay! This is the pinup version... and yes, the fingers made shooting this set a little more difficult than usual on me
I got... attached to the fingers...

When there was time for everything

.
.
.
.
.
Capy cake day tooooooo meeeeee
Yay!
Kool and the Gang command you to celebrate with me!
Breakfast
Lunch
Dinner
It me
Dessert
Hive Bakery in Flower Mound, TX is THE BOMB.
Cat tax!

item.dc:creator: ChocolatePoopy

item.title: Thank you for central heating
item.description: Patented the revolutionary gas-powered heating furnace on December 23, 1919 (Patent #1,325,905). Her design used natural gas to warm air and distributed it through a system of ducts to individual rooms, serving as a forerunner to modern central heating and HVAC systems.
item.dc:creator: SimeonTheSapient

item.description: A handsome fellow fox

item.title: Sandra and Latif Hafraoui, a New Jersey couple that voted for Trump 3 times, were SHOCKED when Latif, originally from Morocco was arrested by ICE and spent months in detention, facing legal fees of $50,000 and unable to work.
item.description: When Sandra was asked what she'd say to Trump, she said: “You said you were going after the worst of the worst, but instead you ruined our life.”
item.dc:creator: LunaAtlas
